items.title: Ghalibaf: US punished itself with triple-digit oil prices
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf has mocked the US over the rise in global oil prices above $100 a barrel, saying Washington has ended up punishing itself instead of Iran.

items.title: IRGC targets US base in retaliation for strike on Arbaeen pilgrims’ route
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced a retaliatory strike against a US military facility in response to a recent attack on the Shalamcheh border crossing, which is a route utilized by Arbaeen pilgrims.

items.title: Foreign minister heads to Kyrgyzstan for SCO ministerial meeting

items.title: Tehran condemns UK decision to grant US access to military bases, says Britain complicit in aggression

items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Chinese ambassador to Tehran says his country has always supported Iran’s efforts to defend its sovereignty and national interests, emphasizing Beijing’s willingness to play a constructive role in restoring peace and security to the West Asian region.

items.title: Iraqi envoy says Baghdad committed to deeper ties with Iran
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – Iraq’s ambassador to Iran, Yasser Abdulzahra Al-Hajjaj, says that an upcoming visit by Iraqi Prime Minister Ali Al-Zaidi to Tehran reflects Baghdad’s commitment to expanding bilateral cooperation and strengthening coordination on issues of mutual interest.

items.title: 53 martyred, 592 wounded in recent US aggression on Iran: Health Ministry
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Iranian Ministry of Health reports that US airstrikes on the country between June 27 and the morning of July 31 left 53 people martyred and 592 others wounded.
